title: Cake & Jazz: Livestream Concert
description: A magical evening of jazz and cake chat streamed straight to your home, featuring Lyubomir Tolumbadjiev and Petar Koychev.
descriptionEn: A magical evening of jazz and cake chat streamed straight to your home, featuring Lyubomir Tolumbadjiev and Petar Koychev.
descriptionBg: Магическа вечер с джаз и разговори за торти, излъчвана директно до вашия дом, с участието на Любомир Толумбаджиев и Петър Койчев.
body:
Ami Oprenova's 'Cake&Jazz' Livestream Series has been entertaining viewers with a baking and performing combo from home. 

This weeks Episode will be a Livestream Concert and Cake Chat straight to your phone! Join us for a magical and fun Sunday evening! Ami will be accompanied by the bulgarian Gypsy Swing experts, the amazing Lyubomir Tolumbadjiev on violin & Petar Koychev on guitar! 
If you would like to donate to the musicians or help towards the idea of Cake&Jazz you can do so here: 
https://www.paypal.me/jazzinthecity

We look forward to seeing you online this weekend! Ami & Team
bodyEn: Ami Oprenova's "Cake & Jazz" livestream series brings together baking and performing from the comfort of home. Join us for a magical Sunday evening featuring a livestream concert and "cake chat"! Ami will be accompanied by Bulgarian gypsy swing experts Lyubomir Tolumbadjiev (violin) and Petar Koychev (guitar).
bodyBg: Онлайн поредицата на Ами Опренова „Кейк и Джаз“ съчетава сладкарството и музиката от уюта на дома. Присъединете се към нас за една магическа неделя с концерт на живо и разговори за торти! С Ами ще бъдат българските експерти по джипси суинг Любомир Толумбаджиев (цигулка) и Петър Койчев (китара).
